_readme: Append-only public benchmark scoreboard. Each row is one eval run. Substrate rows (no LLM, deterministic) are marked substrate:true and MUST NOT be quoted as live agent performance. Wet-eval rows (substrate:false) are appended by the T5.5 weekly CI workflow once it lands. Newest row first.

rows.notes: Phase E1 — per-PR deterministic substrate gate, CI-enforced by scripts/check_scoreboard.py: the live LangGraph agent runs its tactic prediction over the 200-incident corpus with NO LLM (deterministic tier), and this row's mitre_accuracy must match a fresh CI run within 0.02 or CI fails. tokens/USD are 0 because the deterministic tier makes no LLM calls. Live-LLM (substrate:false) rows with real token/USD/latency come from the funded weekly wet-eval.yml job. Do not quote this substrate row as live-agent-with-LLM performance.

v1.4 substrate snapshot — deterministic CI gate, no LLM call. tokens / USD are projected by scripts/eval_telemetry.py from the 4-chars/token estimator and the illustrative 2026-05 public rate card; treat as an upper-bound budget, not a real bill. mtc fields are null because substrate runs in milliseconds and is not a meaningful end-to-end timing. Wet-eval rows from the T5.5 weekly job will replace these placeholders for live MTC.
